response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and extensive distributed systems experience, they fall significantly short on a primary technical minimum qualification. The role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming; this candidate shows only ~1 year of explicit C++ experience at National Instruments (2000-2001), with the bulk of their 34-year career in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and other languages. For a technical lead role specifically requiring C++ expertise in cloud compute platform engineering, this represents a critical skill gap that cannot be mitigated through interview or mentoring.
strengths: Proven experience architecting and maintaining large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests per second
Deep infrastructure and DevOps background including Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD automation, and cloud deployment
Demonstrable commitment to software craftsmanship through teaching, TDD practices, and open-source contributions
concerns: Only ~1 year of documented C++ experience versus 8 years explicitly required; primary career languages are JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang
Career trajectory is generalist full-stack (web, mobile, embedded) rather than specialized cloud compute platform engineering
Limited evidence of technical leadership mentoring experience despite Staff-level titles; background emphasizes individual technical contribution

key_factors.factor: C++ Programming Requirement (8 years vs. ~1 year)
